rows.description: Computus Thomas Stinton Coll. Exon. Rectoris a 2do Nov.ris 1795 ad eundem diem revolutionum 1796.
rows.notes: Top title is legible and spans the page top. No monetary columns on this line; handwriting is clear though a few abbreviations (Latin) are present.
Section heading clearly written immediately under the title. Word is slightly stylized (handwritten 'arrearagia' / 'arrearagia recepta'), but clearly a header introducing the list of receipts.
Clear entry and well aligned with the right-hand £ s d columns: '152. 17. 0' is unambiguous and validates (shillings <20, pence <12).

rows.description: Guineas Rectory half a year to Mis.
rows.notes: Amount '30. 0. 0' is clearly aligned in the £ s d columns. The description word after 'Guineas Rectory half a year to' is somewhat abbreviated/uncertain ('Mis.'), so confidence reduced for description only; numbers are clear.
Numeric columns aligned: shown as '17. 2. 10 1/2' (pence halfpenny indicated by small loop/ob). Description 'Ridlington' is slightly uncertain in spelling but readable; fraction 1/2 is clear.
Amount '8. 11. 6' is well aligned and clear. Description 'Garsington Sadler' is legible; small ink variance but no ambiguity in numbers.
Amount '8. 11. 6' repeated; alignment clear. Name 'Puckett' readable. All numeric values within valid ranges.
Amount '41. 13. 10' aligned and legible. Place/name spelling ('Tintinhull'/'Tintonhill') is somewhat uncertain from handwriting but readable enough for description; numeric columns unambiguous.
Shown as '5. 1. 11 1/2' — halfpenny indicated by loop after pence. Description spelling uncertain (handwriting), but amounts are clearly aligned and within valid ranges.
Amount '2. 0. 0' is clear. The description (place/name) is fairly smudged/abbreviated — read as 'Montacute Black Smith' but letters are uncertain, so lower confidence on text though numbers are fine.
Amount '7. 16. 2' clearly in the columns. Surname/place 'Finy' is legible though could be 'Finny' — minor handwriting ambiguity in description only.

rows.description: South Newington Tenement Tho. Penn 1 year
rows.notes: Amount '2. 11. 3' clear and aligned. Description includes abbreviation 'Tho.' for Thomas; handwriting for the tenant surname 'Penn' is readable. Numeric validation OK.
Amount '40. 0. 0' clear. The place name looks like 'Menhert' or 'Menhert' (handwriting uncertain) so description confidence reduced while numbers are unambiguous.
Amount '11. 14. 8' clearly aligned. Description is legible. Ink slightly lighter but digits validate correctly.
Amount '12. 2. 6' readable. The parenthetical tenants 'Barnett and Burgess' are abbreviated and slightly crowded in the handwriting; description reading plausible but not crystal-clear.
Amount '9. 0. 0' legible. Place/name 'Tuthwynn' (or similar) is quite unclear in the handwriting; interpreted as a year-and-a-half tenancy from the phrasing, but description uncertain.

This is the first of a grouped set (Pad/Ld Lane entries). The pounds/shillings/pence read as '18. 13. 4' to produce the group total seen nearby; description 'Ld Lane Conyers' is inferred from handwriting 'Ld Lane Conyers' though letters are cramped.
Amount '13. 6. 8' clearly aligned. Description 'Ld Lane Wilson' is legible; part of the three-line Pad/Ld Lane group whose numbers validate with the visible subtotal.

rows.description: Ld Lane Hallifax late Warner 2 years
rows.notes: Amount '3. 6. 8' clearly shown. The name reads as 'Hallifax' (late Warner) — the parenthetical 'late Warner' is visible albeit small; grouping with the two prior Ld Lane entries is clear.

Subtotal for the preceding Ld Lane entries appears as '35. 6. 8' (written with a small leading '£'). This aligns with the sum of the three above (18.13.4 + 13.6.8 + 3.6.8 = 35.6.8), confirming the reading.
To the right of the subtotal is a half-share shown as '17. 13. 4' — visually this is half of 35.6.8 and the digits are clearly written and aligned; interpreted as the amount taken (half of subtotal).
Amount '6. 0. 0' clear and aligned. 'Bampton 6 years' legible and unambiguous.
Amount '6. 10. 10' is clear. The name reads 'S. G. Page Turner' (or similar abbreviation) — the initials and surname are slightly cramped but legible; numeric values unambiguous.
Amount printed as '0. 10. 0' (10 shillings) and clearly aligned. 'Jesus College' inscription is clear.
Amount '6. 0. 0' clear. Description 'Back Gate Coppins' is legible in the handwriting.
Amount '6. 6. 0' clearly aligned. The place/name reads as 'Wild Parish' (letters somewhat stylized), so description has minor uncertainty while numbers are clear.

Final page total at lower right reads '392. 3. 5 1/2' — pounds and shillings unambiguous; pence shows '5' with halfpenny loop (interpreted as 0.5). Slight smudge nearby but digits and fraction are readable and consistent with alignment.
